articles.title: 'Lovely Country Of Iran...': Trump Flips Script, Drops Bombshell On Israel & Americans | WATCH
articles.description: Speaking after the Iran conflict, President Trump said the U.S. is expanding agricultural exports worldwide, highlighting a potential new market in Iran and claiming China has committed to purchasing at least $17 billion in U.S. farm products, primarily soybeans. Trump touted a sharp reduction in the agricultural trade deficit, vowed continued support for ethanol producers, and promised billions in farm relief, portraying his trade agenda as a major boost for American agriculture.#Trump #DonaldTrump #AmericanFarmers #ChinaDeal #Iran #USFarmers #Soybeans #FarmExports #TradeWar #USPolitics #IranWar #China #Agriculture #BreakingNews #TrumpSpeech

articles.title: HC allows 15-year-old rape survivor to end 28-week pregnancy
articles.description: The Delhi High Court allowed a 15-year-old rape survivor to terminate her 28-week pregnancy, citing potential mental health harm and extraordinary jurisdiction.

articles.title: Trump's Great American State Fair Hit By Empty Seat Claims While POTUS Boasts 'Incredible Crowd'
articles.description: Donald Trump's highly anticipated Great American State Fair is facing scrutiny after live television footage and social media posts appeared to show empty chairs and large open spaces before the U.S. President took the stage. CNN reporters, Associated Press observations, and viral crowd photos sparked debate over attendance numbers at the National Mall event. Critics pointed to sparse sections and reports of attendees leaving during Trump's speech, while supporters argued crowds grew throughout the evening. The controversy comes as Trump promotes the 16-day Freedom 250 celebration.

articles.description: In a recent Reddit post, a Bengaluru man reached out to strangers to play the role of his ‘long-time friends’ all to impress a girl. The incident has reignited a familiar discussion: in a metropolis of millions, why do so many people still feel lonely?

articles.title: Spanish Proverb of the Day: 'A thief who steals from a thief has a hundred years of forgiveness...'- A timeless lesson on justice, morality, and human nature
articles.description: A Spanish proverb, 'A thief who steals from a thief has a hundred years of forgiveness,' highlights society's complex view on justice. It suggests people often feel less sympathy for wrongdoers facing consequences from their own kind, reflecting a natural inclination towards fairness. While not condoning theft, the saying underscores that actions can return to their source, prompting reflection on human psychology and the cycles of wrongdoing.

articles.title: Iran accuses Trump aide of watering down June 17 agreement; peace deal already in trouble?
articles.description: Fresh tensions have emerged between Washington and Tehran after Iran accused the U.S. of attempting to reinterpret key provisions of the June 17 peace framework. The dispute was triggered by comments from Secretary of State Marco Rubio questioning whether regional hostilities can fully end while Iran-backed groups remain active. Iranian officials insist that a complete ceasefire across the region is a core pillar of the agreement and warn that any effort to alter its terms could undermine trust and complicate implementation.

articles.title: Indian Passport Not Conclusive Proof Of Citizenship? Says Harish Salve Amid Citizenship Row | News18
articles.description: In a heated debate on passports, citizenship, and identity documents, former Solicitor General of India Harish Salve explained the legal distinction between an Indian passport and conclusive proof of citizenship.Salve argued that while a passport is an important travel document and is widely accepted as proof of nationality for international travel, it cannot be treated as definitive proof of citizenship in every legal context. He stressed that different institutions may require different documents depending on the purpose and legal framework involved. n18oc_india News18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

articles.title: High Commissioner Dinesh Trivedi gets Cabinet Minister-level status
articles.description: India's High Commissioner to Bangladesh, Dinesh Trivedi, has been granted a status equivalent to a Union Cabinet Minister. This personal measure applies only to ceremonial functions and does not amend the official Table of Precedence.

articles.title: Bidadi township row: Kumaraswamy to meet 'those who will be affected by project'
MEA Says Passport Not Definitive Proof Of Citizenship, Sparks National Debate | #plainspeak
articles.description: The Ministry of External Affairs has clarified that an Indian passport is not definitive proof of citizenship, sparking a national debate over identity verification, citizenship documentation and legal clarity. The clarification has triggered political backlash and renewed calls for a unique citizenship document.Experts say the issue highlights the need for clearer rules on how citizenship is established, verified and protected, especially amid rising anxiety over documentation, migration, voter rolls, passports, Aadhaar, birth records and government-issued IDs. The debate now centres on legal certainty, public trust and whether India needs a dedicated citizenship certificate or database. n18oc_indian18oc_plain-speak News18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube
